en: In the four hundred and eightieth year after the people of Israel came out of the land of Egypt, in the fourth year of Solomon's reign over Israel, in the month of Ziv, which is the second month, he began to build the house of the LORD.
zh: 以色列人出埃及地以後四百八十年，所羅門作以色列王的第四年西弗月，就是二月，他動工建造耶和華的殿。

en: The house that King Solomon built for the LORD was sixty cubits long, twenty cubits wide, and thirty cubits high.
zh: 所羅門為耶和華所建的殿，長二十七公尺，寬九公尺，高十三公尺半。

en: The vestibule in front of the nave of the house was twenty cubits long, equal to the width of the house, and ten cubits deep in front of the house.
zh: 殿的前廊長九公尺，和殿的寬度一樣，寬四公尺半。

en: And he made for the house windows with recessed frames.
zh: 又為殿做了窗架子內寬外窄的窗戶。

en: He also built a structure against the wall of the house, running around the walls of the house, both the nave and the inner sanctuary. And he made side chambers all around.
zh: 緊靠殿牆，就是圍著外殿和內殿的牆，他又建造平臺，圍繞殿的四周，做成廂房。

en: The lowest story was five cubits broad, the middle one was six cubits broad, and the third was seven cubits broad. For around the outside of the house he made offsets on the wall in order that the supporting beams should not be inserted into the walls of the house.
zh: 廂房的下層寬兩公尺兩公寸；中層寬兩公尺七公寸；第三層寬三公尺一公寸。他在殿牆外面四周留有暗架，所以梁木不必插入殿牆裡。

en: When the house was built, it was with stone prepared at the quarry, so that neither hammer nor axe nor any tool of iron was heard in the temple while it was being built.
zh: 建殿是用採石場預備好了的石料；所以建殿的時候，在殿裡聽不到鎚子、斧頭或任何鐵器的聲音。

en: The entrance for the lowest story was on the south side of the house, and one went up by stairs to the middle story, and from the middle story to the third.
zh: 廂房的下層門在殿的右邊，人可以從螺旋形梯子上廂房的中層，再從中層上到第三層。

en: So he built the house and finished it, and he made the ceiling of the house of beams and planks of cedar.
zh: 所羅門建殿，建造完成以後，就用香柏木的棟梁和香柏木的木板做殿的天花板。

en: He built the structure against the whole house, five cubits high, and it was joined to the house with timbers of cedar.
zh: 靠著聖殿所建的廂房，每層高兩公尺兩公寸，都用香柏木的梁木與殿連接。

en: Now the word of the LORD came to Solomon,
zh: 耶和華的話臨到所羅門說：

en: "Concerning this house that you are building, if you will walk in my statutes and obey my rules and keep all my commandments and walk in them, then I will establish my word with you, which I spoke to David your father.
zh: “關於你正在建造的這殿，如果你遵行我的律例，實行我的典章，謹守我的一切誡命，並且照著去行，我就必向你實現我應許你父親大衛的話。

en: And I will dwell among the children of Israel and will not forsake my people Israel."
zh: 我必住在以色列人中間，也必不離棄我的子民以色列。”

en: So Solomon built the house and finished it.
zh: 所羅門建殿，並且建造完成。

en: He lined the walls of the house on the inside with boards of cedar. From the floor of the house to the walls of the ceiling, he covered them on the inside with wood, and he covered the floor of the house with boards of cypress.
zh: 殿內的牆壁，從地面到天花板，都貼上香柏木，殿內的地面，都鋪上松木板。

en: He built twenty cubits of the rear of the house with boards of cedar from the floor to the walls, and he built this within as an inner sanctuary, as the Most Holy Place.
zh: 又建內殿長九公尺，從地面到天花板，他用香柏木板隔開，成為至聖所。

en: The house, that is, the nave in front of the inner sanctuary, was forty cubits long.
zh: 內殿前面的外殿長十八公尺。

en: The cedar within the house was carved in the form of gourds and open flowers. All was cedar; no stone was seen.
zh: 殿的內部都貼上香柏木，上面刻有匏瓜和初開的花朵，全部都是香柏木，一塊石頭都看不見。

en: The inner sanctuary he prepared in the innermost part of the house, to set there the ark of the covenant of the LORD.
zh: 他在殿中預備了內殿，好把耶和華的約櫃安放在那裡。

en: The inner sanctuary was twenty cubits long, twenty cubits wide, and twenty cubits high, and he overlaid it with pure gold. He also overlaid an altar of cedar.
zh: 內殿長九公尺，寬九公尺，高九公尺；內部都貼上精金，用香柏木做的壇也貼上精金。

en: And Solomon overlaid the inside of the house with pure gold, and he drew chains of gold across, in front of the inner sanctuary, and overlaid it with gold.
zh: 殿的內部所羅門都貼上精金，把金鍊掛在內殿的前面，內殿也都貼上精金。

en: And he overlaid the whole house with gold, until all the house was finished. Also the whole altar that belonged to the inner sanctuary he overlaid with gold.
zh: 他把整個的殿都貼上金子，直到整個的殿都貼完；在內殿的壇，整個都貼上了金子。

en: In the inner sanctuary he made two cherubim of olivewood, each ten cubits high.
zh: 在內殿，他用橄欖木做了兩個基路伯，各高四公尺四公寸。

en: Five cubits was the length of one wing of the cherub, and five cubits the length of the other wing of the cherub; it was ten cubits from the tip of one wing to the tip of the other.
zh: 第一個基路伯一邊的翅膀長兩公尺兩公寸，另一邊的翅膀也是兩公尺兩公寸；由這翅膀尖到那翅膀尖共有四公尺四公寸。

en: The other cherub also measured ten cubits; both cherubim had the same measure and the same form.
zh: 第二個基路伯的兩個翅膀也是四公尺四公寸長。兩個基路伯的大小和樣式都是一樣的。

en: The height of one cherub was ten cubits, and so was that of the other cherub.
zh: 第一個基路伯高四公尺四公寸，第二個基路伯也是一樣。

en: He put the cherubim in the innermost part of the house. And the wings of the cherubim were spread out so that a wing of one touched the one wall, and a wing of the other cherub touched the other wall; their other wings touched each other in the middle of the house.
zh: 他把兩個基路伯安放在內殿裡面，基路伯的翅膀是張開的；這一個基路伯的一個翅膀接到這邊的牆壁，另一個基路伯的一個翅膀接到另一邊的牆壁，他們另外的兩個翅膀在殿的中間彼此相接。

en: And he overlaid the cherubim with gold.
zh: 他又把這兩個基路伯貼上金子。

en: Around all the walls of the house he carved engraved figures of cherubim and palm trees and open flowers, in the inner and outer rooms.
zh: 內殿和外殿周圍的牆壁上，他都刻上基路伯、棕樹和初開的花朵的雕刻。

en: The floor of the house he overlaid with gold in the inner and outer rooms.
zh: 內殿和外殿的地板上也都貼上金子。

en: For the entrance to the inner sanctuary he made doors of olivewood; the lintel and the doorposts were five-sided.
zh: 內殿的入口，他用橄欖木做了門扇、門楣和五根門柱。

en: He covered the two doors of olivewood with carvings of cherubim, palm trees, and open flowers. He overlaid them with gold and spread gold on the cherubim and on the palm trees.
zh: 他在橄欖木做的兩門上，雕刻上基路伯、棕樹和初開的花朵。他又在基路伯和棕樹上包上了金子。

en: So also he made for the entrance to the nave doorposts of olivewood, in the form of a square,
zh: 他又照樣為外殿的門，用橄欖木做了四根門柱。

en: and two doors of cypress wood. The two leaves of the one door were folding, and the two leaves of the other door were folding.
zh: 用松木做的兩扇門，這一扇有兩葉，是疊合在一起的，那一扇也有兩葉，也是疊合在一起的。

en: On them he carved cherubim and palm trees and open flowers, and he overlaid them with gold evenly applied on the carved work.
zh: 他又在上面刻上了基路伯、棕樹和初開的花朵；又在雕刻上緊貼上金子。

en: He built the inner court with three courses of cut stone and one course of cedar beams.
zh: 他又用鑿好了的石頭三層，香柏木一層建造內院。

en: In the fourth year the foundation of the house of the LORD was laid, in the month of Ziv.
zh: 所羅門在位第四年西弗月，奠定了耶和華殿的根基。

en: And in the eleventh year, in the month of Bul, which is the eighth month, the house was finished in all its parts, and according to all its specifications. He was seven years in building it.
zh: 第十一年布勒月，就是八月，聖殿各部分都按照計劃完工了。所羅門共用了七年的時間建造聖殿。
